question: Will Abelardo de la Espriella be the next president in Colombia?
reason: Abelardo de la Espriella is statistically tied with Iván Cepeda in recent polls.
evidence: In a February 2026 poll, De la Espriella had 32.1% support, while Cepeda had 31.4%. ([bloomberg.com](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-07/colombia-s-presidential-race-deadlocked-between-left-and-right?utm_source=openai))

A May 2026 poll shows De la Espriella leading with over 25% support, with a significant portion of voters undecided. ([elpais.com](https://elpais.com/america-colombia/elecciones-presidenciales/2026-05-26/la-ultraderecha-toma-vuelo-en-colombia.html?utm_source=openai))
